title: spiranthes madrensis
intro: Spiranthes madrensis, also known as the Mountain Ladies' Tresses, is a species of orchid native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Spiranthes madrensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the roots or flowers in water, creating a tea that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
